headline: A compact command center for the Royals season

latest_prospect_update.name: Blake Mitchell
latest_prospect_update.note: Most obvious remaining minor-league prospect to track; catcher development and power/patience are the main signals. Recent line: .167 / .333 / .250.

nightly_recap: The Royals beat the Seattle Mariners, KC 8, SEA 6. Salvador Perez led the night, 3-4 | 3 RBI, R in the latest Royals game. Jac Caglianone supplied the loudest Royals contact at 114.3 mph.

player_of_game.name: Salvador Perez
player_of_game.reason: 3-4 | 3 RBI, R in the latest Royals game.
